title: HMI 3D Buckets
body:
## About:
Adds 3D Buckets with 2D sprites and different textures for axolotl buckets depending on what variant of axolotl is inside. Also adds different texture styles you can switch between if you have [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) installed. Was specifically made for [HMI 5.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) but works for vanilla to

## Future Plans:
- Custom animations for the creatures inside once HMI supports it

## Dependencies:
- **[OPTIONAL]** **[Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)** - required to change texture style
- **[OPTIONAL]** **[Hold my Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)** - required for some features like lava glow

If you have any issues or questions please either come to my [Discord](https://discord.gg/yyu96tfSJw) or the forum on the HMI Discord
